actions.location: Minneapolis, MN - State Capitol / downtown area
actions.description: Student-led walkout and rally against immigration enforcement and ICE operations.
organizing_groups: Students for Justice in Palestine local
actions.expected_turnout: 500-2000 (notes: school walkouts reported across 45 states; high student participation expected)
actions.notes: High likelihood of multi-hour raw streams from known sources like Unicorn Riot coverage in Twin Cities.

actions.location: Portland, OR - various downtown and waterfront locations
actions.description: Running Down the Walls prisoner support action and march. Solidarity with political prisoners.
actions.expected_turnout: hundreds (recurring annual event with strong Portland autonomous scene participation)
actions.notes: Strong Portland signal; often features multiple independent livestreamers. Correlates with UR coverage of autonomous actions.

actions.location: Twin Cities, MN - multiple sites including ICE facilities, hotels, and public spaces
actions.description: Melt the ICE week of action: protests, walkouts, teach-ins, noise demos, tenant actions against ICE operations and related housing/immigration issues.
actions.expected_turnout: large (multi-day coordinated actions across sites; strong local networks)
actions.notes: Direct from UR coverage and organizer lists. Excellent for correlating with high-priority sources in sources.json. Multi-location; monitor for live updates from known streamers.

actions.location: Portland, OR - general meeting and action planning
actions.description: Portland DSA general meeting followed by branch actions and working group reports (labor, eco, anti-ICE).
actions.notes: Recurring; good for Portland autonomous and progressive signal. Often ties into broader actions listed on IGD and other calendars.
